steps.title: Rank the per-employee values
steps.content: Tribal economic activity contributed about 141,510 per employee. That is less than wholesale trade at 183,790, but greater than professional services at 110,157 and administration/waste at 60,132.

steps.title: Reject inaccurate rankings
steps.content: B is wrong because tribal activity is not above wholesale trade. C is wrong because tribal activity is above professional services and administration/waste. D wrongly says it is nearly equal to wholesale trade and uses "either" even though it is above both lower categories. The answer is A.
